$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Role select" (S3) in flow "xplor-hub-login". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Role select
purpose: After login, choose who is signing children in: parent or collection contact.
entry: From a successful login on the parent/contact journey
exit: → S4 via either role card; back → S1
layout: Two-column grid of person cards: Parent (Jessica Jones · James May) · Collection Contact (Samuel Weinhandl), each with a Casual Session pill and trailing chevron

redlines.spec: 64px, radius 12, initials fallback (no external avatar service)

behaviour: Tapping either role card opens Child select (S4).
Photos fall back to a cyan initials tile — the prototype loads no external avatar assets.
a11y: Person cards are divs with role=button + tabIndex — build must add Enter/Space key activation (prototype gap).
Each card's accessible name should combine role + people (e.g. 'Parent — Jessica Jones and James May').

acceptance.text: Both role cards open Child select.
acceptance.assert: click(card Parent) -> step == child; click(card Collection Contact) -> step == child
